title: Ruizterania verruculosa
taxonomy: Ruizterania verruculosa is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. This family consists of over 2,000 species of plants commonly known as African violets and their relatives. The Gesneriaceae family is part of the order Lamiales, which comprises flowering plants with bilateral symmetry. Within the order Lamiales, the family Gesneriaceae is one of the largest and most diverse. Ruizterania verruculosa's classification is further divided into various genera and species within the Gesneriaceae family.
